---
title: Early warning for great earthquakes from characterization of crustal deformation patterns with deep learning
date: '2021-01-01'
author: [J-T Lin, Diego Melgar, Amanda M Thomas, Jake Searcy]
publication: 'Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth, **10**, _e2021JB022703_ (2021).'
categories: [environment]
url_source: 'https://agupubs.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1029/2021JB022703'
url_preprint: ''
journ: 'Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth'
issue: 10
page: "e2021JB022703"
year: 2021
image: ''
pub_number: 2
---
